rows.notes: Amounts and row type agreed by both extractors. Visually verified values. Adopted 'Summa Receptorum' as description text, correcting 'Summe' from gpt-5-mini and ensuring only text is in the description field, as per requested output format.

Amounts and row type agreed by both extractors. Visually verified values. Adopted 'Summa Solutorum' as description text, correcting 'Summe solutionum' from gpt-5-mini and ensuring only text is in the description field.

Amounts and row type agreed by both extractors. Visually verified values. Corrected description from 'Solved' (gemini-flash) to 'Solred' and adjusted 'Comput' to 'computs.' based on careful visual inspection, while largely agreeing with gemini-flash's 'a dis'.

rows.description: Of wch sum was Lodged in yr chest
rows.notes: Amounts and row type agreed by both extractors. Visually verified values. Adopted gemini-flash's description as it is a more accurate transcription of the text 'Of wch sum was Lodged in yr chest', correcting 'of sd' and 'ye' from gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Portion of the receipts lodged in the college chest.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Portion of the receipts lodged in the college chest, amounting to £190 19s 8½d.

rows.description: on July 20th 1766. Mr Gray & Charles Curtis being present.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's transcription of '20th' and 'Mr Gray', correcting gpt-5-mini's '26th' and 'Geffrey'. Both extractors agreed on row type and empty amounts.
rows.english_description: Note of the meeting dated 20 July 1766 with Mr Gray and Charles Curtis present.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Note of the meeting dated 20 July 1766 with Mr Gray and Charles Curtis present.

rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's transcription of 'Novembris', correcting gpt-5-mini's 'November'. Both extractors agreed on row type and empty amounts.

Both extractors had significant errors in transcribing this Latin phrase. Visually verified as 'Computis comprobatis per Nos Præsentes', correcting 'comprobatio' (gemini-flash) and 'compositus/Presentes' (gpt-5-mini). gpt-5-mini's note was good for highlighting ambiguity, but its reading was less accurate.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'Jno. Webber Rectorem', correcting gpt-5-mini's 'Joas...Rectorum'. Agreed with gemini-flash's 'entry' row type, as this records a specific signatory, not a general section header.
rows.english_description: John Webber, the Rector; signature attesting the accounts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: John Webber, the Rector; signature attesting the accounts.

rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description 'Tho. Gray Subrectorem', correcting gpt-5-mini's 'Subrectorum' and including the period after 'Tho.'. Agreed with gemini-flash's 'entry' row type for a specific signatory.
rows.english_description: Thomas Gray, the Sub-rector; signature attesting the accounts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Thomas Gray, the Sub-rector; signature attesting the accounts.
